basic_details.job_title: ICSIL Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Intelligent Communication Systems India Ltd (ICSIL) has officially announced the Project Associate Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. ICSIL/RC/10-A//Forest Deptt./2025-26 at icsil.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 32 years and hold a Postgraduate degree in Environment, Forestry, Biodiversity, or Allied Sciences from a recognized university can now submit their online applications from 11 May 2026 to 18 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Environment/Forestry/Biodiversity/Allied Sciences from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Project Associate: Postgraduate in Environment/Forestry/Biodiversity/Allied Sciences from the recognized university. 0-2 Years full time work experience in the Govt. Department. Individual having completed course in Environmental Studies, Urban Planning, Forest Management, Social Work, Sustainable Development, Development Studies and water resources engineering or practical experience in the above field would be preferred. Experience shall be counted on the basis of full time work experience in Govt. Department in the field of Forestry, Wildlife, Natural Resources Management and Environment. Good Communication skill good command in proficiency on MS Office (Like Power Point Presentation, word, Excel).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSIL Project Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSIL Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ICSIL Project Associate position is 18th May 2026. Ensure you apply before this deadline to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Environment, Forestry, Biodiversity, or Allied Sciences from a recognized university to be eligible for the Project Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate post is 32 years. Please check the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 46,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICSIL Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official ICSIL website (www.icsil.in) by filling out the application form and paying the required fee before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a non-refundable application fee of Rs. 590/- for all candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate post in this recruitment drive by ICSIL.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position is on a contractual outsourced basis for the Department of Forest and Wildlife, GNCT of Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of documents, followed by an interaction/interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article, where a direct download link is provided.
